bindings.title: @simongerman600: This is wonderful. This page turns New York into a massive, zoomable,...
bindings.excerpt: This is wonderful. This page turns New York into a massive, zoomable, SimCity-style pixel art map. You can explore the city block by block: streets, skyscrapers, parks, waterfronts, bridges and neighbourhoods. A beautiful rabbit hole for map nerds: https://isometric.nyc/

bindings.title: Marijana Pavlinić / Digital Stamp Collection
bindings.excerpt: Paying homage to my grandpa's lifelong passion for philately, by recreating his stamps in a digital form, exploring the blend of art, history, and typography and bringing it online for a new audience to enjoy.

bindings.title: @iamlukethedev: Seeing a lot of people struggling to enable Telegram Rich Messages in Hermes...
bindings.excerpt: Seeing a lot of people struggling to enable Telegram Rich Messages in Hermes @NousResearch Here’s the fastest way to turn it on: Tell your agent: 1️⃣ Update yourself 2️⃣ Enable rich messages in my config: rich_messages: true 3️⃣ Restart the gateway 4️⃣ Send a test message Then test it with this prompt: Let’s test now Summarize this as a Telegram rich table...
bindings.source_title: @iamlukethedev: Seeing a lot of people struggling to enable Telegram Rich Messages in Hermes...
bindings.source_summary: Seeing a lot of people struggling to enable Telegram Rich Messages in Hermes @NousResearch Here’s the fastest way to turn it on: Tell your agent: 1️⃣ Update yourself 2️⃣ Enable rich messages in my config: rich_messages: true 3️⃣ Restart the gateway 4️⃣ Send a test message Then test it with this prompt: Let’s test now Summarize this as a Telegram rich table with columns: Task, Owner, Status.
